title: ImprovementSignal
description: A signal captured from openclaw or claude_code indicating a condition that may warrant a system improvement.

source.description: The system plane that emitted this signal.

signal_type.description: The specific type of signal. Valid values depend on the source.

oneOf.description: Signal types valid when source is openclaw.
Signal types valid when source is claude_code.

severity.description: The severity level of the signal.

captured_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the signal was captured.

version.description: Schema version of this signal document.

project_id.description: Optional identifier of the project associated with this signal.

task_id.description: Optional identifier of the task associated with this signal.

evidence.description: Optional unstructured evidence object containing supporting details for the signal.

cluster_id.description: Optional identifier grouping related signals into a cluster.
